top_signals.title: OKX Launches X-Perps on the Magnificent 7 Stocks, Gold, Silver and Oil for European Traders
top_signals.summary: First MiFID-licensed platform to offer European retail traders 24/7 futures exposure to US stocks, commodities and the world's biggest* indices alongside crypto, on one account SpaceX X-Perps to be available following IPO on June 12
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump insists an end to the Iran war is still only 'days' away despite recent strikes
top_signals.summary: Speaking to reporters after attending the NBA Finals in New York, Trump said the two parties are in the final stages of a "very, very good deal".
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The 'SaaSpocalypse' is over, says private equity giant Thomas Bravo. Here's why it sees an AI boom for software
top_signals.summary: Thoma Bravo founder Orlando Bravo says AI offers an "enormous tailwind" for software companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Humanity's $36 million exploit tied to compromised laptop hosting a 'multisig' wallet
Rotor Sail Wind Propulsion Design Gains Approval for MR Tankers
top_signals.summary: Anemoi Marine Technologies and its partners have completed a joint development project aimed at simplifying the integration of Rotor Sail wind propulsion systems on medium-range (MR) tankers, with classification society DNV granting Approval…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Clearlake Completes Strategic Acquisition of Pathway Capital Management
top_signals.summary: Expands Clearlake’s private markets solutions for institutional and private wealth markets Combined platform represents over $185 billion in assets under management with more than 500 global employees

top_signals.title: Promega Receives SBTi Validation for Near-Term Science-Based Emissions Reduction Targets
top_signals.summary: Validated targets cover Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions, including a supplier engagement commitment reaching 67% of suppliers by spend by 2030
